name: Nordic Frost
description: A minimal, clean palette inspired by Scandinavian design. Muted cool tones, generous white space, and functional simplicity. Ideal for products that value clarity, efficiency and understated elegance.
author: System

referenceTokens.--surface-hierarchy: near-white base, subtle gray borders, minimal shadow
referenceTokens.--intended-usage: SaaS, note-taking, productivity, design tools, corporate sites
referenceTokens.--text-approach: Gray-800 for headings, gray-600 for body, blue for links and actions
referenceTokens.--spacing-approach: Generous whitespace, balanced padding, clean grid alignment
